nasb.text: But I said, “Should a man like me flee? And could one such as I go into the temple to save his life? I will not go in.”

esv.text: But I said, “Should such a man as I run away? And what man such as I could go into the temple and live? I will not go in.”

cnv.text: 我回答：“像我這樣的人，怎可以逃跑呢？哪有像我這樣的人，進入聖殿裡去保全自己的性命呢？我決不進去！”

ccb.text: 但我回答说：“像我这样的人岂能逃跑？岂能进入殿里保命？我决不进去。”
